attacking_style: Prone to committing to aggressive solo bridge efforts without proper calculation of energy expenditure, leading to premature exhaustion before key moments.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of coordinated team support; appears to make independent tactical decisions that leave him isolated and overextended.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine clear terrain preferences, though flat sprint scenarios have exposed pacing judgment issues.
vulnerability: Poor energy management on solo efforts; misjudges when to commit versus when to wait for peloton dynamics to play out, resulting in early exhaustion.
key_patterns: Misjudges effort required for solo bridge attempts, burning matches prematurely (2 observations)
Unable to contest sprints after committing to unsuccessful chase efforts (2 observations)
First to abandon efforts when initial tactical gamble fails (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race observation insufficient to determine trend, but tactical decision-making appears problematic
